name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-10
title: Branch name, worktree path, and identity are hardcoded across multiple files
description: _BRANCH = 'bug-backlog-files' and _WT_REL = '.claude/tmp/bug-backlog-files' are duplicated as string literals across SKILL.md, branch_ops.py, all test fixtures, and the spec.md. Renaming the branch would require editing many places. Move to a single constants module (e.g. .claude/features/rabbit-file/scripts/constants.py) or read from feature.json. Same applies to the rabbit-file@localhost identity hardcoded in two places in branch_ops.py.
